hero.title: Find Your Perfect Home
hero.subtitle: Quality properties across Transylvania — from cozy apartments to family houses, all within your reach.

valueProposition.title: Why Reveria
valueProposition.subtitle: A property platform that works differently.

approach.title: Fewer listings, better vetted
approach.description: Most platforms dump thousands of listings and leave you to figure it out. We're building Reveria around a different idea — a smaller selection of properties, each one reviewed, with someone local to help you through the process.

curated.title: Every listing is reviewed
curated.description: Before a property goes live on Reveria, it goes through our review process. We check the details, flag anything that doesn't add up, and only publish listings we'd be comfortable recommending.

guidance.title: Agents who actually know the city
guidance.description: Our agents live in the cities they cover. They know which neighborhoods are growing, which buildings are well-built, and what a fair price looks like on any given street. That's not something you get from a listing page.

mortgage.title: Mortgage Calculator
mortgage.description: Calculate your monthly payments, compare bank rates, and plan your mortgage with confidence.

purchaseCost.title: Purchase Costs
purchaseCost.description: See the full cost of buying — notary fees, taxes, commissions, and all hidden charges.

rentalYield.title: Rental Yield
rentalYield.description: Estimate your return on investment, net yield, and monthly cash flow from rental properties.

borrowingCapacity.title: Borrowing Capacity
borrowingCapacity.description: Find out how much you can borrow based on your income and existing debts.

0.question: What is Reveria and how can it help me?
0.answer: Reveria is a real estate platform focused on affordable, quality properties across Transylvania. We help buyers find carefully curated homes priced up to €999,999, with transparent listings and expert agent support throughout the process.

1.question: What types of properties can I find on Reveria?
1.answer: You can find apartments, houses, villas, terrains, penthouses, and more. We cover a wide range of property types across multiple cities in Transylvania, all within the affordable price segment.

2.question: In which cities are properties available?
2.answer: We currently feature properties in Cluj-Napoca, Oradea, Timișoara, Brașov, and Sibiu — with more cities being added regularly.

3.question: How does the buying process work through Reveria?
3.answer: Browse our listings, contact our agents for viewings, and get guided support through the entire purchase process including documentation, negotiations, and closing. Our agents are here to make it seamless.

4.question: Are Reveria listings verified?
4.answer: Yes. Every property listed on Reveria goes through a review process. We verify ownership, accuracy of descriptions, and ensure photos accurately represent the property.

5.question: Is it free to use Reveria as a buyer?
5.answer: Absolutely. Browsing properties, contacting agents, and scheduling viewings is completely free for buyers. There are no hidden fees or registration requirements.

0.question: What is Reveria and how can it help me?
0.answer: Reveria is a real estate platform focused on affordable, quality properties across Transylvania. We help buyers find carefully curated homes priced up to €999,999, with transparent listings and expert agent support throughout the process.

1.question: What types of properties can I find on Reveria?
1.answer: You can find apartments, houses, villas, terrains, penthouses, and more. We cover a wide range of property types across multiple cities in Transylvania, all within the affordable price segment.

2.question: In which cities are properties available?
2.answer: We currently feature properties in Cluj-Napoca, Oradea, Timișoara, Brașov, and Sibiu — with more cities being added regularly.

3.question: How does the buying process work through Reveria?
3.answer: Browse our listings, contact our agents for viewings, and get guided support through the entire purchase process including documentation, negotiations, and closing. Our agents are here to make it seamless.

4.question: Are Reveria listings verified?
4.answer: Yes. Every property listed on Reveria goes through a review process. We verify ownership, accuracy of descriptions, and ensure photos accurately represent the property.

5.question: Is it free to use Reveria as a buyer?
5.answer: Absolutely. Browsing properties, contacting agents, and scheduling viewings is completely free for buyers. There are no hidden fees or registration requirements.

6.question: Can I schedule a property viewing online?
6.answer: Yes! You can request a viewing directly from any property listing page. Our agents will confirm the appointment and guide you through the visit.

7.question: How do I contact an agent?
7.answer: You can reach our agents through the contact form on any property page, via the inquiry modal, or by visiting our Agents page to find a specialist in your preferred city.

8.question: Does Reveria offer properties for rent?
8.answer: Currently, Reveria focuses on properties for sale. We are considering expanding to rentals in the future — stay tuned for updates.

9.question: What documents do I need to buy a property?
9.answer: Typically you'll need a valid ID, proof of income or financing, and funds for the down payment. Our agents will guide you through all required documentation specific to your situation.

cta.subtitle: Our team is happy to help with any questions you may have.

hero.title: Building the Path to Your Home in Transylvania
hero.description: Reveria connects you with quality, affordable properties across Transylvania's most vibrant cities. No inflated prices, no hidden fees — just honest real estate for real people.

story.title: Why We Started Reveria
story.paragraph1: We saw a problem that too many families in Transylvania were facing: a housing market full of overpriced listings, misleading photos, and agents who cared more about commission than finding the right fit. Good homes existed, but finding them felt like searching for a needle in a haystack.
story.paragraph2: Reveria was born from a simple idea — what if there was a platform that only listed quality properties at fair prices, backed by agents who actually know the neighborhoods? We started in Cluj-Napoca and grew to cover Brașov, Sibiu, Oradea, and Timișoara. Every property on Reveria is reviewed before it goes live, because we believe you deserve to trust what you see.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: These aren't just words on a page. They shape every decision we make, every property we list, and every family we help.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear pricing with no hidden costs. Honest descriptions that match reality. Real photos, real floor plans, and verified ownership. We believe trust starts with telling the truth.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Quality living shouldn't require a luxury budget. We focus exclusively on properties that offer genuine value — comfortable, well-built homes in great locations at prices that make sense.

community.title: Community
community.description: A home is more than four walls. We care about the neighborhoods, the schools nearby, the local cafes and parks. We help you find not just a property, but a place where your family belongs.

support.title: Support
support.description: From your first search to the day you get your keys, our local agents walk alongside you. Questions about financing, paperwork, or neighborhoods — we're a message away.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Finding your home through Reveria is straightforward. Three steps, no surprises.

browse.title: Browse & Discover
browse.description: Search by city, budget, or neighborhood. Filter by what matters to you — every listing is verified and photographed.

connect.title: Connect with an Agent
connect.description: Our local agents know every street. Schedule viewings, ask questions, and get honest advice tailored to your needs.

moveIn.title: Move In
moveIn.description: From offer to keys, we handle the complexity. Documentation, negotiations, and closing — all guided by your agent.

cities.title: Across Transylvania
cities.subtitle: From university hubs to historic gems, we cover the cities where life is good and property makes sense.

cta.title: Ready to Find Your Home?
cta.subtitle: Browse our collection of verified properties or reach out — we're here to help you every step of the way.

meta.title: Useful Tools — Property Calculators
meta.description: Free property calculators for mortgage payments, purchase costs, rental yield, and borrowing capacity. Plan your property investment in Transylvania with confidence.

hero.title: Useful Tools
hero.subtitle: Free calculators and guides to help you make informed property decisions.

mortgage.title: Mortgage Calculator
mortgage.description: Calculate monthly payments, total interest, and compare Romanian bank rates. Plan your mortgage with a detailed amortization schedule.

purchaseCost.title: Purchase Cost Calculator
purchaseCost.description: See the full cost of buying property in Romania — notary fees, land registry, agent commission, stamp duty, and legal fees.

rentalYield.title: Rental Yield Calculator
rentalYield.description: Estimate gross and net rental yield, monthly cash flow, and payback period for your investment property.

borrowingCapacity.title: Borrowing Capacity Calculator
borrowingCapacity.description: Find out the maximum you can borrow based on your income, existing debts, and Romanian banking regulations.

guidesSection.title: Guides & Articles
guidesSection.subtitle: In-depth guides and market insights to help you navigate the Romanian property market.

ToolsPage.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates and do not constitute financial advice. Actual amounts may vary. Consult a financial advisor for personalized guidance.
ToolsPage.eurRonDisclaimer: Notary fees calculated using an approximate exchange rate of 1 EUR = 4.97 RON. Actual rates may vary.

meta.title: Mortgage Calculator — Monthly Payments & Amortization
meta.description: Calculate your mortgage monthly payments, total interest, and view the full amortization schedule. Compare Romanian bank rates.

mortgage.title: Mortgage Calculator
mortgage.subtitle: Calculate monthly payments, total interest, and plan your mortgage with Romanian bank rates.

meta.title: Purchase Cost Calculator — Full Buying Costs in Romania
meta.description: Calculate the full cost of buying property in Romania including notary fees, land registry, agent commission, and legal fees.

purchaseCost.title: Purchase Cost Calculator
purchaseCost.subtitle: See every cost involved in buying property in Romania — no hidden surprises.
purchaseCost.notaryFeeInfo: Based on Romanian notary fee brackets, calculated in RON and converted to EUR.
purchaseCost.landRegistryInfo: Approximately 0.15% of property value for land book registration.
purchaseCost.agentCommissionInfo: Standard real estate agent fee, typically 2-3% of property price.
purchaseCost.stampDutyInfo: Fixed administrative fees for document processing.
purchaseCost.legalFeesInfo: Estimated cost for legal representation during the purchase process.
purchaseCost.feesPercent: Additional costs represent {percent} of the property price

meta.title: Rental Yield Calculator — ROI for Investment Properties
meta.description: Calculate gross and net rental yield, monthly cash flow, and payback period for investment properties in Romania.

rentalYield.title: Rental Yield Calculator
rentalYield.subtitle: Estimate your return on investment for rental properties in Transylvania.
rentalYield.annualExpensesInfo: Include maintenance, property tax, insurance, and management fees.

meta.title: Borrowing Capacity Calculator — How Much Can You Borrow
meta.description: Calculate the maximum mortgage you can afford based on your income, debts, and Romanian banking regulations (40% DTI rule).

borrowingCapacity.title: Borrowing Capacity Calculator
borrowingCapacity.subtitle: Find out how much you can borrow based on Romanian banking regulations.
borrowingCapacity.existingDebtsInfo: Include car loans, credit cards, and other monthly debt payments.
borrowingCapacity.dependentsInfo: Spouse, children, or other persons you support financially.
borrowingCapacity.nouaCasaInfo: Government-backed mortgage program. Max property: €70,000. Down payment: 5% (new build) / 15% (existing).
borrowingCapacity.nouaCasaExceeds: Property exceeds Noua Casă €70,000 limit — capped.
borrowingCapacity.insuranceInfo: Banks require life insurance (~0.05% of balance/month). This reduces your borrowing capacity slightly.
borrowingCapacity.ratesFallback: Using estimated rates. Live rates currently unavailable.
borrowingCapacity.totalMonthlyCostInfo: Including mortgage payment, insurance and property insurance.
borrowingCapacity.dtiExplainer: Romanian regulations (BNR) limit total monthly debt payments to 40% of net income.
